|desc={{p|Glimmet}} are Geeta's first and second known Pokémon. In ''[[HZ079|Over the Top!]]'', they were used alongside {{p|Glimmora}} in her battle against [[Liko]], [[Roy]], and [[Dot]]. During the battle both Glimmet knocked themselves out using Memento on Crocalor and Quaxwell, which weakened both of them.

Their known moves are {{m|Rock Polish}}, {{m|Power Gem}}, {{m|Venoshock}}, and {{m|Memento}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Geeta
|pkmn=Glimmora
|tera=Rock

|img2=Geeta Glimmora Terastal.png

|desc={{p|Glimmora}} is Geeta's third known Pokémon. In ''[[HZ079|Over the Top!]]'', it was used alongside two {{p|Glimmet}} in her battle against [[Liko]], [[Roy]], and [[Dot]]. After the four {{Tera}}stallized, it defeated Crocalor and Quaxwell with a Tera Blast before being defeated by Floragato's {{m|Magical Leaf}}, which resulted in Geeta losing the match.

Glimmora's known moves are {{m|Dazzling Gleam}}, {{m|Spiky Shield}}, {{m|Tera Blast}}, and {{m|Mortal Spin}}{{tt|*|mentioned only}}, and its [[Ability]] is {{a|Toxic Debris}}.}}
